content:
[DATE_TIME]. Directors, Executive Officers and Corporate Governance
Information about our Executive Officers
The name, age, position and office, and business experience during [DATE_TIME] of our current executive officers are:
Dean C. Athanasia (54) President, Retail and Preferred & Small Business Banking since [DATE_TIME]; Co-Head -- Consumer Banking from [DATE_TIME]; and Preferred and Small Business Banking Executive from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (60) Chief Operations and Technology Officer since [DATE_TIME]; Global Technology & Operations Executive from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (52) Chief Human Resources Officer since [DATE_TIME]; Global Human Resources Executive from [DATE_TIME]; and HR Executive for Global Banking & Markets from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (60) Chief Financial Officer since [DATE_TIME]; Strategic Finance Executive from [DATE_TIME]; and Head of Global Corporate Credit and Transaction Banking from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (56) Chief Risk Officer since [DATE_TIME]; Head of Enterprise Capital Management from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (57) President, Private Bank since [DATE_TIME]; Head of Business Banking from [DATE_TIME]; and Retail Banking & Distribution Executive from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (60) Global General Counsel since [DATE_TIME]; General Counsel of Ford Motor Company from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (64) Chief Operating Officer since [DATE_TIME]; Co-Chief Operating Officer from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (61) Chairman of the Board since [DATE_TIME], and President, Chief Executive Officer, and member of the Board of Directors since [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (62) Vice Chairman, Bank of America Corporation since [DATE_TIME]; Co-Head -- Consumer Banking from [DATE_TIME]; Retail Banking Executive from [DATE_TIME]; and Retail Strategy, and Operations & Digital Banking Executive from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (53) President, Merrill Lynch Wealth Management since [DATE_TIME]; and Head of Global Wealth & Retirement Solutions with Merrill Lynch from [DATE_TIME].
[PERSON] (54) Chief Administrative Officer since [DATE_TIME]; Global Head of Human Resources from [DATE_TIME].
Information included under the following captions in the Corporation’s proxy statement relating to its [DATE_TIME] meeting of stockholders (the [DATE_TIME] Proxy Statement) is incorporated herein by reference:
● “Proposal 1: Electing directors - Our director nominees;”
● “Corporate governance - Additional corporate governance information;”
● “Corporate governance - Committees and membership;” and
● “Corporate governance - Board meetings and attendance.”
Item 11.
